title: Magic World: New era Match3 PRG
description: Go on a campaign and make great victories! Explore the depths of an ancient dungeon and challenge powerful titans and heroes guarding their lair with countless treasures! Fight against other players for fame and fortune! Summon the strongest heroes, train and upgrade them to assemble the powerful team! Unleash the skills of the heroes and use the strengths and weaknesses of the elementals to win! All this will require you to have a careful eye and a strategic mind!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
